name: Sable_xo
bio: looking for my person. if you're boring, swipe left babe.
psychological_stake:
- The most humiliating thing that happened to me this week was when I accidentally super-liked my ex Dylan's mom on Instagram while stalking her vacation photos from Mykonos 2023.

- The thing about my body I'm convinced everyone notices but actually no one does is how my circumcision scar from Dr. Peterson in 2004 is slightly asymmetrical on the left side.

- My last sexual accident or mishap was when I got tangled in Bethany's platform heels during foreplay and we both crashed into her IKEA nightstand last Thursday.

- The kink I've never said out loud to anyone is wanting someone to read my entire Spotify Wrapped 2022 playlist out loud while I climax.

- The substance I leaned on harder than I should have last month was Febreze Hawaiian Breeze and I used it to mask the scent of my desperation after texting Marcus seventeen times.

- The most embarrassing impulse purchase on my last bank statement is a £47 astrology reading from PsychicSarah_UK about my romantic compatibility with someone I met at Tesco.

- If you opened my browser history at 3am last Tuesday you'd find fourteen different articles about whether Scorpios are compatible with Geminis and one WikiHow about penis yoga.

- The last lie I told on a
